---
title: "mathslop dot org"
---

Goal is to write some math every day. I make no promise on quality, but ideally these get better over time.

## Daily Math

- [6/19-6/??: The Prime Spectrum of a Ring](posts/june19.qmd)
- [6/18: An Elementary Number Theory Problem (Cont.)](posts/june18.qmd)
- [6/17: An Elementary Number Theory Problem](posts/june17.qmd)
- [6/16: Problem A1 from the 2024 Putnam](posts/june16.qmd)
- [6/15: Problem B1 from the 2025 Putnam](posts/june15.qmd)
- [6/14: Problem B2 from the 2022 Putnam](posts/june14.qmd)
- [6/13: Problem B3 from the 2022 Putnam](posts/june13.qmd)
